\n⏳ Veredeln mit GraXpert (Gradient + En: ⏳ Enhancing with GraXpert (gradient + denoise) … (can take 1–2 min)
Tipp: Für den vollen Starless-Workflo: Tip: for the full starless workflow → Tools → Starless workflow.

<h3>Was ist ForgePix?</h3><p>ForgePix ma:
What is ForgePix?

ForgePix turns many photos into one better image — fully automatically, and it explains what it does.

🔬 Macro: several close-ups with shifting focus → one fully sharp image.
🌌 Astro: many frames of the night sky → noise-free.
🌗 Hybrid: Moon/Sun mosaic or Focus+Astro.
📷 Long exposure: from a burst without an ND filter (silky water, light trails …).

It's simple: pick a module → choose a folder (or drop it on the window) → ⚡ Automatic. In Beginner mode one click is enough; Pro mode opens all controls.

The AI is optional — everything runs without a server too. It only advises and never secretly changes pixels.

More in the guide (docs/GUIDE) and via the “?” next to each setting. Shortcuts: F1.
An die KI gehen nur: einige Vorschau-Fra: The AI only receives: a few preview frames, the sharpness profile, EXIF basics and your wish. No original files, no location data.
An: auf dem Bild malen. Plus/Aufnehmen l: On: paint on the image. Plus/Add applies the adjustment there, Minus/Protect removes it. Starts from the auto mask (if active), else empty. Keys: B brush, A/S +/-, [ ] size, Backspace clears mask.
An: übermalte Stellen wieder auf das urs: On: reset painted areas back to the original stack result.
Analysiert die Bewegung in der Serie und: Analyses the motion across the series and suggests the matching effect
Analysiert eine Auswahl der Frames + das: Analyzes a sample of frames + the sharpness profile and suggests settings (needs an AI server).
Anfänger = ein Klick. Profi = alle Regle: Beginner = one click. Pro = all controls + wizard.
Anhaken, wenn mit Dual-Band-/Schmalband-: Tick if shot through a dual-band / narrowband filter (Ha+OIII): then Hα (red) and OIII (teal) are SEPARATED and recombined as HOO (red Hα nebulae + teal OIII areas instead of red-dominated). No filter / broadband: leave off (then color calibration + green removal).
Tick if shot through a dual-band / narrowband filter (Ha+OIII): then NO green removal is applied so the OIII signal (teal/blue-green) is preserved. Leave off for no filter / broadband.
Astro: viele Aufnahmen desselben Himmels: Astro: many frames of the same sky area → average out noise. Recommended: 20–100+ lights (more = less noise) · darks 15–30 · flats 15–30 · bias 30+. Optionally give a folder/file.
Aufhellung 5–30 (höher = schwaches Signa: Brightening 5–30 (higher = lift faint signal more, core stays protected). Saturation 1.0–1.6. Color calibration 0–1 (0 = off, 1 = fully neutralize the background against a color cast).
Aufnahme-Filter wählen (oder wird aus de: Pick the capture filter (or it is detected from the FITS header). Dual-band/narrowband (Ha+OIII), e.g. SVBony SV220 or L-eXtreme: Hα (red) and OIII (teal) are SEPARATED and recombined as HOO (red Hα nebulae + teal OIII areas). No filter/broadband: color calibration + green removal.
Aus einer Serie eine Langzeitbelichtung: A long exposure from a burst, no ND filter: silky water, light trails, remove movers.  Recommended: 10–30 (water) up to 300+ (light trails).
Batch: jeder Unterordner = eigener Stack: Batch: each subfolder = its own stack
Bearbeiten (E) · Export (⌘E) · Werkzeuge: Edit (E) · Export (⌘E) · Tools for ghost map/retouch.
Bei dieser Distanz/Blende reicht ein Bil: At this distance/aperture one image is enough (very large depth of field).
Bewertet jede Aufnahme (Sternzahl/FWHM/E: Grades every frame (star count/FWHM/elongation/clouds/trails) and drops bad subs — with reasons in the log. Off = use all frames.
Bild im Filmstreifen wechseln: Switch image in the film strip
Please select at least one target.
Bitte zuerst einen Eingabe-Ordner mit de: Please choose an input folder with the series first.
Bitte zuerst einen Eingabe-Ordner wählen: Please choose an input folder first.
Blende/Abbildung → Schärfentiefe, Schrit: Aperture/magnification → depth of field, step size and number of frames for full sharpness (shooting assistant).
Brennweite, Blende, Sensor und (falls vo: Take focal length, aperture, sensor and (if present) focus distance from a photo's EXIF.
Camera-Raw: Belichtung, Kontrast, Weißab: Camera Raw: exposure, contrast, white balance, clarity, color — with live preview and histogram.
Das Tool läuft weiter und verrechnet aut: The tool keeps running and stacks automatically as soon as you copy new photos into the folder.
Die Bild-KI empfiehlt schonende Werte fü: The image AI suggests gentle values for sharpening/clarity/denoise; applied with classic filters — nothing invented. Without an AI server a fixed, subtle default is used.
Downscale-Langseite für die Schärfe-Anal: Downscale long edge for sharpness analysis (speed).
Ebenen-Datei: keine Quellfotos gefunden: Layered file: no source frames found (focus stacking only).
Ein Klick genügt. Für mehr Kontrolle mit: One click is enough. For more control, step through with „Next →“.
Ein Klick: GraXpert entfernt Gradienten: One click: GraXpert removes gradients and denoises the image (free tool). Not installed? ForgePix tells you where to get it.
Ein extern bearbeitetes Bild zurück in F: Load an externally edited image back into ForgePix (for preview/edit/export).
Empfohlen: Glatt 10–30 · Lichtspuren 30–: Recommended: Smooth 10–30 · Light trails 30–300+ (gap-free) · Declutter 8–20 · Brighten 10–60. Tripod, identical exposure.
Entfernt fast identische Doppelaufnahmen: Removes near-identical duplicates. Caution: in focus series neighbouring frames look similar on purpose — only enable if you really have duplicate shots.
Entfernt weiche Helligkeits-Gradienten (: Removes soft brightness gradients (light pollution/vignette). For stronger tools: open the 32-bit linear TIFF in GraXpert/StarNet++/PixInsight.
Entwickelt RAW in halber Größe — schnell: Develops RAW at half size — faster, less detail. Good for quick tests.
Ergebnis sofort in dieses Format exporti: Export the result to this format instantly (no dialog).
Erzeugt eine Datei mit dem fertigen Bild: Creates a file with the final image + all single frames as layers — the basis for the retouch editor.
Erzeugt eine Karte (ghostmap.jpg), die r: Creates a map (ghostmap.jpg) showing in red where the photos strongly disagree — i.e. where motion/ghosting is likely.
Erzeugt neben dem Hauptbild zusätzlich p: Alongside the main image, also creates suitably resized and platform-sharpened JPGs (Instagram 1080px, WhatsApp 1600px, Web 2048px, 4K 3840px, Print = full size).
Falls du die Schärfereihe von hinten nac: If you shot the focus series back to front.
Farbe = aus welchem Foto (Reihenfolge) d: Colour = which photo (in order) the sharpest details come from. Blue = early, red = late frames. A smooth gradient = a clean series.
Fotos fast ganz ohne Struktur (komplett: Photos with almost no structure (completely blurry/black) are dropped.
Fragt einmal beim Start die GitHub-Relea: Queries the GitHub releases once at start and shows a hint if a newer version exists. No data sent.
Frame verwerfen, wenn Schärfe darunter (: Drop a frame when sharpness is below this (featureless/empty).
Freitext an die KI. Wird beim KI-Vorschl: Free text for the AI. Taken into account verbatim in the AI suggestion.
Färbt jeden Bereich danach, aus welchem: Colours each area by which photo the sharpest details come from.
Geheimer Schlüssel des Anbieters. Bleibt: The provider's secret key. Stored locally. Note: a ChatGPT subscription is NOT an API key.
Glatt = seidiges Wasser/weiche Wolken (k: Smooth = silky water/soft clouds (classic ND look). Light trails = collect bright motion (car lights, star trails, fireworks). Declutter = moving objects disappear (median). Brighten = sum up light for dark scenes.
GraXpert: Hintergrund/Gradient (Lichtver: GraXpert: remove background/gradient (light pollution). Found = one click + automatic re-import; otherwise reveal the result in the file manager. Path in the Setup menu.
GraXpert: remove background/gradient (light pollution). Installed = one click + automatic re-import; otherwise reveal the result in the file manager.
Hellt das Bild automatisch auf. Aus = or: Brightens the image automatically. Off = faithful to original (recommended).
Hot-/Cold-Pixel = entfernt helle/dunkle: Hot/cold pixel = removes bright/dark single pixels (sensor defects) before stacking. Drizzle 2× = integrate upscaled 2× (finer sampling for undersampled data; "drizzle-lite", not true pixel fractions like PixInsight).
Hybrid: Mosaik = überlappende Kacheln (M: Hybrid: Mosaic = stitch overlapping tiles (Moon/Sun), ~30% overlap, 4–20+ tiles. Focus+Astro = several shots (5–15) per focus position in a subfolder, multiple positions.
Im Ordner wurden nur %d Bild(er) gefunde: Only %d image(s) found in the folder. Start anyway?
In stark uneinigen Zonen wird der Median: In strongly disagreeing zones the median of the photos is used instead of blending — reduces double edges from motion. Rest via retouch.
Inneren Frame verwerfen, wenn Schärfe <:
Drop an inner frame when sharpness < ratio × min(neighbors).
Higher = stricter. 0 = never drop for a dip.
Keine EXIF-Optikdaten gefunden (exiftool: No EXIF optics data found (exiftool required).
A quick explanation of what ForgePix does.
Legt Helligkeit/Klarheit nur auf die mit: Applies brightness/clarity only to mid tones (nebula/subject) — bright core/stars and dark background stay protected. Ideal for astro & macro, no painting needed.
Makro/Fokus: mehrere Nahaufnahmen mit Fo: Macro/focus: several close-ups focusing front to back → one fully sharp image. Recommended: 10–40 frames (enough to cover everything sharp), tripod, identical exposure.
Mehrere Nahaufnahmen → ein durchgehend s: Several close-ups → one fully sharp image.
Several close-ups → one fully sharp image. Products, coins, insects, food.  Recommended: 10–40 frames.
Misst die Schärfe jeder Aufnahme in Kach: Measures each frame's sharpness in tiles and drops photos that are sharp NOWHERE (shaky/misfocus) — with reasons in the log. The value on the right is the strictness (default 0.45). In addition to the neighbour strictness above.
Measures each frame's sharpness in tiles and drops photos that are sharp NOWHERE (shaky/misfocused) — with reasons in the log. In addition to the neighbour strictness above.
Misst, wo & wie sich die Aufnahmen unter: Measures where & how the frames differ (classic, no server needed) and picks Smooth/Light trails/Declutter/Brighten — with a reason. You can override the suggestion any time.
Modul: Makro / Astro / Hybrid / Langzeit: Module: Macro / Astro / Hybrid / Long exposure
Mond-/Sonnen-Mosaik aus Kacheln — oder F: Moon/Sun mosaic from tiles — or Focus+Astro (denoise first, then focus-stack).  Mosaic 4–20+ tiles · Focus+Astro 5–15 shots per position.
Mosaik = überlappende Kacheln zusammense: Mosaic = stitch overlapping tiles. Focus+Astro = per focus position, first astro-stack several shots (reduce noise), then focus-stack (depth of field). Ideal for low-light macro/moon/sun series.
Name des Bild-Modells (z.B. gpt-4o-mini: Name of the image model (e.g. gpt-4o-mini or the local model).
Nebel-Boost im Starless-Ergebnis: 0 = fl: Nebula boost in the starless result: 0 = flat, 1 = full. Applies instantly (no new StarNet run).
Noch kein Ergebnis.\nWähle einen Ordner:
No result yet.
Choose a folder and run Automatic.
Nur Fotos auswählen, noch nicht verrechn: Only select photos, don't stack yet — to check the selection.
Nur bei Dual-Band. HOO = datentreu (Hα r: Dual-band only. HOO = true to data (Hα red, OIII teal). SHO synthetic = Hubble look (gold + blue) — the SII is SYNTHESIZED from Hα (dual-band contains NO real SII), so for looks only, not scientific.
Nur wenn KEINE Unterordner: so viele auf: Only when there are NO subfolders: this many consecutive photos = one focus position. Better: make one subfolder per position.
Ohne KI läuft alles per Heuristik (übera: Without AI everything runs heuristically (works everywhere). Optionally enable an image AI — local/server or a provider with an API key.
Ohne ND-Filter: seidiges Wasser, Lichtsp: No ND filter: silky water, light trails, movers gone.
Ordner einer weiteren Nacht desselben Ob: Add a folder from another night of the same target — everything is merged into ONE stack (more integration = better result).
Ordner wählen, hier klicken. Die KI best: Choose a folder, click here. The AI picks all settings, RAW runs in 16-bit, a layered TIFF for further editing is created.
Pfade zu deinen installierten Tools. Lee: Paths to your installed tools. Leave empty = ForgePix searches itself (PATH + common locations). GraXpert/StarNet → one click in the result bar; Siril → selectable astro engine. All optional.
RAW (ARW/NEF/CR2/DNG…) wird mit rawpy en: RAW (ARW/NEF/CR2/DNG…) is developed with rawpy so the whole chain runs at high bit depth. Non-RAW is left untouched.
RAW-Dateien (ARW/NEF/CR2/DNG …) werden z: RAW files (ARW/NEF/CR2/DNG …) are first gently developed into a high-quality image so the full quality is kept for editing. Normal JPGs are used directly.
RAWs zu TIFF entwickeln (treu, vor dem S: Develop RAWs to TIFF (faithful, before stacking)
Rauschen mitteln statt Schärfe wählen. „: Average noise instead of picking sharpness. "sigma" (kappa-sigma) removes satellites/planes/hot pixels — like Siril. "max" = trail lines.
Reduziert Bildrauschen im Ergebnis (kant: Reduces image noise in the result (edge-preserving). 0 = off.
Richtet die Fotos exakt übereinander aus: Aligns the photos exactly on top of each other (compensates tiny shifts). Should almost always be on.
SHO Foraxx (dynamisch: reines Hα rot, ge: SHO Foraxx (dynamic: pure Hα red, mixed gold)
SHO synthetisch (Hubble gold + blau, SII: SHO synthetic (Hubble gold + blue, faked SII)
Schieberegler: schärfstes Einzelfoto geg: Slider: compare the sharpest single photo against the finished image.
Schnellvorlage je Motiv: setzt sinnvolle: Quick preset per subject: sets sensible values (sharpening, alignment, detection). "Products/Coins/Food" — fine-tune manually afterwards.
Schnellwahl: lokaler/eigener Server, Ope: Quick pick: local/own server, OpenAI or OpenRouter (both need an API key), or a custom address.
Schwelle: Foto raus, wenn die schärfste: Threshold: drop a photo if its sharpest spot is below this (× series median). Higher = stricter.
Schärft das fertige Bild leicht nach (in: Lightly sharpens the final image (in %). 0 = off. Macro often 10–25%.
So geht's:&nbsp;&nbsp; <b style='color:#: How to:   1 choose a module  →  2 choose a folder or drop it on the window  →  3 ⚡ Automatic
Software-Binning fasst 2×2 (bzw. 3×3) Pi: Software binning merges 2×2 (or 3×3) pixels: less noise, rounder/smaller stars, half the resolution. Good for oversampled data (large stars/FWHM).
Speichert das fertige Stack-Ergebnis zus: Also saves the final stack result as 32-bit FITS (next to the TIFF) — for PixInsight/Siril. FITS lights are also read directly.
Speichert zusätzlich ein normales JPG zu: Also saves a normal JPG for sharing/sending.
Sprache, Anfänger/Profi, KI-Server — sch: Language, Beginner/Pro, AI server — adjustable before you start.
Sprache, KI-Server und weitere Einstellu: Language, AI server and more settings
StarNet++: remove stars (starless). Found = one click + automatic re-import; otherwise reveal the result in the file manager. Path in the Setup menu.
StarNet++: remove stars (starless). Installed = one click + automatic re-import; otherwise reveal the result in the file manager.
Stern-Stärke im Starless-Ergebnis: 0 = o: Star strength in the starless result: 0 = no stars, 1 = full stars, higher = stronger.
Sternenhimmel/Deep-Sky: kalibrieren, aus: Starry sky/deep-sky: calibrate, align, average noise, drop bad subs.  Recommended: 20–100+ lights (+ darks/flats).
Sternenhimmel: ausrichten, Rauschen mitt: Starry sky: align, average noise, calibrate.
Steuert NUR das angezeigte/exportierte V: Controls ONLY the displayed/exported preview JPG (the linear TIFF/FITS stay untouched). Auto = the AI (if a server is set) or sensible defaults decide brightening/saturation/color. Uncheck to set it yourself.
Sucht im Aufnahme-Ordner (und darüber) n: Looks for subfolders named „darks“, „flats“, „bias“ in (and above) the capture folder and applies them automatically — removes amp glow/vignetting with no manual work. Manual fields above take precedence.
Tipp: Im Anfänger-Modus genügt „Ordner w: Tip: in Beginner mode just "choose a folder" — the automatic explains its decisions.
Tipp: an Halos/Doppelkonturen (Ghosting):
Tip: paint over halos/double edges (ghosting)
to pull the sharp area from a source photo.
Eraser resets.
Translation = nur Verschiebung (nachgefü: Translation = shift only (tracking mount, fast). Translation + field rotation = also aligns rotated fields (Alt-Az mount without rotator, long sessions) — via star features.
Untersucht die Fokusreihe: verwackelte F: Examines the focus series: shaky photos, redundant frames, focus coverage and the optimal frame count.
Vom Stativ: „nicht ausrichten“. Bei leic: On a tripod: "don't align". For slight shake "shift" (translates), handheld "features" (aligns fully).
Vorsatz für den Dateinamen des Ergebniss: Prefix for the result file name.
Was möchtest du stacken? Modul wählen —: What would you like to stack? Pick a module — switch any time via "◀ Modules".
Watch-Modus: Ordner beobachten und autom: Watch mode: monitor folder and stack automatically
Wenn dein Ordner mehrere Foto-Serien in: If your folder contains several photo series in subfolders (e.g. several flowers), each series is stacked separately. The automatic also detects this by itself.
Wie Farben/Weiß interpretiert werden. „c: How colours/white are interpreted. "camera" = the camera's setting (recommended), "auto" = computer estimates, "daylight" = daylight.
Wie fein Farbabstufungen gespeichert wer: How finely colour gradations are stored. 16 = highest quality for editing (recommended), 8 = smaller, less headroom.
Wie groß die Fotos für die Schärfe-Messu: How large the photos are downscaled for the sharpness measurement. Higher = more accurate but slower. 1600 is a good value.
Wie markante Punkte zum Ausrichten gefun: How distinctive points for alignment are found. ORB = fast (default), SIFT = more accurate on low-texture subjects but slower.
Wie streng verwackelte Einzelfotos ausso: How strictly shaky single frames are dropped. Higher = stricter. Only photos clearly blurrier than their neighbours (real shake) are dropped — not the naturally soft ends of the focus series.
Wie viele Sekunden Ruhe (kein neues Foto: How many seconds of quiet (no new photo) before stacking automatically — so the copy has surely finished.
Wie ähnlich zwei Fotos sein müssen, um a: How similar two photos must be to count as duplicates. Smaller = stricter.
Wähle das Einzelfoto, dessen scharfe Ste: Choose the single frame whose sharp area you want to bring to the painted position.
Zeigt das 32-bit-lineare Ergebnis im Dat: Reveals the 32-bit linear result in the file manager — for PixInsight or other tools.
Zusätzlich ein JPG zum Teilen speichern: Also save a JPG for sharing
„Eigene“ = ForgePix selbst (Standard, ke: "Own" = ForgePix itself (default, no external program). "Siril" = optionally drive your installed Siril (convert→register→stack). Path in the Setup menu → "External tools".
„Virtuelle Belichtungszeit“: stufenlos z: "Virtual exposure time": continuous between a single frame (0% = motion frozen, short time) and full smoothing/trails (100% = longest time). Weighted partial averaging with a sharp reference frame — like a shorter/longer shutter speed.
„rigid“ für Stativ/ruhige Aufnahmen, „ho: "rigid" for tripod/steady shots, "homography" when shot handheld (also corrects perspective).
⚡ Loslegen — Ordner wählen, dann Automa: ⚡  Start — pick a folder, then Automatic
🎯 Auto-Maske: nur Motiv aufhellen (Stern: 🎯 Auto mask: brighten only the subject (protect stars/background)
Für Motive, die sich während der Serie l: For subjects that drift slightly during the series (a flower in the wind, an insect). Aligns the photos on the SUBJECT instead of the whole frame and discards shots where the subject moved too far — preventing double edges. Auto mode detects this on its own too.
Wie die scharfen Bereiche verschmolzen w: How the in-focus areas are merged. “pyramid” = Laplacian pyramid (default): very sharp, ideal for fine/soft structures like flowers and fur. “depthmap” = depth-map selection: picks the sharpest photo per pixel — strong on hard depth edges (insects, coins, circuit boards), but often softer than the pyramid on soft subjects.
